findings.message: The brief still overcommits to a STEP_CONFIG lookup object as the solution in summary/separability sections, but correctly describes helper functions in constraints and plan shape. Internal inconsistency — addressed in Round 3 fixes.
The Resolved note for step config was incorrect — file-level constant insufficient for step 1. Fixed in Round 3.

note: Round 3 is final. Score 4.0 meets credible threshold. Both findings addressed in post-round fixes before artifact finalisation.
